headline: Competitive Pricing Matrix Validated: $1,200/Year Confirmed as Optimal Beachhead Pricing
highlights: ✅ 8 competitors analyzed: Supermetrics, DataBox, Whatagraph, Google Data Studio, Tableau, Looker, Power BI, HubSpot
✅ $1,200/year pricing validated—exactly matches Whatagraph ($1,188) and Supermetrics ($1,188) proven market rate
✅ Strong unit economics: LTV:CAC ratio = 3:1 at $1,500 CAC; 5-year LTV = $4,500–$6,000 per customer
✅ ROI quantified: 6 hrs/week saved = $12,480/year value; 10.4x payback within Year 1
✅ Pricing gaps identified: No purpose-built agency tool in $800–$1,400 range; ReportEase can own this segment
✅ Competitive positioning: Mid-market sweet spot (below $2,988 DataBox; above $0–$600 free/cheap tier)
✅ Tier 2 bundle pricing recommended: 3–10 users @ $2,800/year ($933/user) to drive land-and-expand
✅ White-label opportunity: Phase 2 add-on ($3,000–$5,000/year) for agencies seeking resale rights
✅ Annual discount strategy: $1,000/year (17% savings) drives cash flow; improves retention
✅ DE Step 16 complete: Pricing framework ready for GTM launch and customer validation

next_actions.label: Create Pricing Page with Feature Comparison Matrix

Brief Sales Team on Pricing Strategy & Positioning
